item.itunes:title: CLINT, MEG & DAN FULL SHOW - 15TH SEPTEMBER: BIG SWAP
item.description:
On the show today, We have the boys from Coterie in showing off their new music. Dan tries to dap them up, Clint and Meg are just in awe of them. Hannah from Christchurch joins the show while Dan goes and does her job, want to hear how it all went down stay tuned.

On the show today Meg got the ick from some of the boys from Coterie but also forgave them as they are hot and fun. Dan wants to do BIRD NEWS! and to everyone's surprise it pops off. Clint boasts about being asked to be in a music video clip while Meg and Dan are a bit sour about it.

item.title: CLINT, MEG & DAN FULL SHOW - 13TH SEPTEMBER: DYING WISH
item.itunes:title: CLINT, MEG & DAN FULL SHOW - 13TH SEPTEMBER: DYING WISH
item.description:
On the show today, Meg has a list of jobs Dan didn't want and that he did want growing up. We hear stories of what nurses have had to deal with. Clint Meg and Dan all asked their partners if their dying wish was to sleep with a friend would they let them. the results may or may not shock you.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.description:

item.description:
On today's Only Fans, We received a text from Jess asking what its like to prep a show. We give you all the details we can think of to help get a more clear idea what its like when we come up with ideas, Previous shows in the past and what does happen in-between songs.

item.title: CLINT, MEG & DAN FULL SHOW - 31ST AUGUST: MOCK MY VOICE
item.itunes:title: CLINT, MEG & DAN FULL SHOW - 31ST AUGUST: MOCK MY VOICE
item.description:
On today's show, Meg is low key rebel when she raids the work fridge and uses someone's Oat milk. Dan's diary has a top 9 best songs of all time. Clint brings back what he thinks is the best game of "Blank will always be..." and it falls apart quickly. Dan goes around the office mocking peoples voices after a viral tiktok inspired Clint and Meg to do the same.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.title: CLINT, MEG & DAN SPECIAL GUEST - 30TH JUNE: DR NEIL DEGRASSE TYSONS
item.itunes:title: CLINT, MEG & DAN SPECIAL GUEST - 30TH JUNE: DR NEIL DEGRASSE TYSONS
item.description:
In this special podcast we chat to the one and only Dr Neil deGrasse Tyson. from all thing science to aliens and even superheroes. He is in New Zealand this week.

Neil deGrasse Tyson, a brilliant mind in astrophysics, is embarking on a captivating tour to share his knowledge, insights, and passion for the cosmos. This event promises to be an extraordinary experience, blending scientific wonder with engaging storytelling that will leave audiences inspired and enlightened.

The tour will be taking place in various cities, and we are thrilled to provide you with the tour dates and locations below:

Auckland: Saturday, 1 July, Trusts Arena
Wellington: Sunday, 2 July, TSB Arena

For tickets and more info visit thinkinc.live/tyson.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

item.description:
On this weeks episode, OnlyFans star Elle Brooke joins Uncle Tics in London for arguably the most hectic chat you'll hear on a podcast today... From Elle filming with the worlds biggest pornstar, to Uncle Tics ticcing his mums name in bed; it's raunchy, hilarious, downright fascinating, and everything in between.

1 - Why Elle started OF?

3 - Banging Johnny Sins

8 - Elle's mum & her thoughts on OF

13 - How tics have ruined sex for Uncle Tics

18 - Celebs in Elle's DMs

22 - Security & tall poppies

25 - Rugby boys are the WORST!!!

30 - Elle was grilled by Piers Morgan

34 - Fake Taxi & would Elle ever do porn

36 - More tourettes sex stories

45 - Elle's biggest fetish...?

Episodes out every Wednesday.

item.itunes:title: Joe Daymond - this shit is f***ing wild

Holy shit oi, comedian Joe Daymond has some wild as yarns for us on this episode.

Imagine being in a room with the world's biggest comedian, one of the biggest rappers, and performing for one of the biggest actors... WTF!!!

4 - Update on BEEP dude from season 1

6 - Joe's risky love life & a famous asf band

10 - Living in America & opening for Theo Von

11 - Dave Chapelle and T.I.

17 - Telling a lie to Dave Chapelle

19 - Doing 'Dude, Where's My Car' jokes in front of Ashton Kutcher

20 - Joe's exclusive news

22 - The TAB: 5 years, no sex

item.description:
On the Only Fans Podcast, we chat to Savannah who has set up a billboard to promote her OnlyFans site. Its getting mixed reviews online but she lets us know why she did it and what came of it. We loved chatting with this boss woman and think she is using great initiative to promote herself.

If you want to find her here are the links:

linktr.ee/iamlookingformolly
